prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7892名→5408名→4881名→2876名→3101名。整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字大幅减小），2024年达到峰值2876名后2025年小幅回落至3101名，近两年稳定在2800–3100名区间，表明该校在北京的录取位次已进入高位震荡阶段；该校在北京市综合类招生计划从2021年27人逐年缩减至2024年7人、2025年7人，2026年进一步缩减至6人，较2025年减少1人（缩招约14.3%）。招生计划持续压缩，在考生规模扩大的背景下，竞争将进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，属于国内顶尖工科院校行列，对高分考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要源于2023年电信学部在部分省份出现录取位次断档至60000名的历史事件，对报考心理有一定滞后影响；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，未出现极端负面舆情；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，机械工程、力学、土木工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、软件工程、生物医学工程获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个学科进入A类，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等大连理工核心专业方向在2024年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐或推荐，社会报考热度持续偏高；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅约29.7%），考生规模大幅扩大，竞争压力显著上升；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，距北京较近，交通便利，在京招生占比极小（2026年仅6人），属于跨省报考中的热门选择，地域偏好对位次有一定支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3101名、2026年招生计划缩减至6人（缩招约14.3%）、北京市考生规模大幅增长约29.7%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素：缩招使位次数字趋小（更易进），但考生大幅增加和竞争加剧使位次数字趋大（更难进），后者影响更为显著。预测2026年最低录取位次约2915名，区间2623–3207名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能（未来技术班）（2024年招生专业）
- 电子信息类（创新班）（2021/2023年招生专业）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化（创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（创新班）（2023年招生专业）
- 工商管理类（经济管理实验班）（2021年招生专业）
- 数学类（2021年招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大连理工大学在北京综合类仅招生2个专业（人工智能新工科大师班4人、计算机科学与技术拔尖计划班2人），均为顶尖热门专业。位次在预测区间2623–3207名内建议以二档专业为稳妥选择，位次明显优于区间下限（如2600名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（3200名左右）需谨慎报考。由于招生人数极少（仅6人），位次波动风险较大，建议结合其他同层次院校做组合填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 7892 → 5408 → 4881 → 2876 → 3101. Overall, there is a significant upward trend (ranking numbers greatly reduced), reaching a peak of 2876 in 2024 before slightly falling back to 3101 in 2025. In the past two years, it has stabilized in the 2800–3100 range, indicating that the university's admission ranking in Beijing has entered a high-level fluctuation phase. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing has been gradually reduced from 27 students in 2021 to 7 in 2024 and 7 in 2025, and further reduced to 6 in 2026, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 14.3%). With the continuous compression of enrollment plans and the expansion of the candidate pool, competition will further intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a member of the 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction. It ranks 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the historical event in 2023 where the admission ranking of the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering in some provinces dropped to 60,000, which has a lagging psychological impact on application decisions. Its Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms and no extreme negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Mechanical Engineering, Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, and Biomedical Engineering were rated A, and Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering were rated A-, with a total of 10 disciplines entering the A category. Its engineering strength is outstanding and highly related to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Dalian University of Technology, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, were all rated as highly recommended or recommended in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with social application enthusiasm remaining high. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 from 65,434 in 2025 (an increase of about 29.7%). The candidate pool has significantly expanded, leading to a notable increase in competitive pressure. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, relatively close to Beijing with convenient transportation. Its enrollment share in Beijing is extremely small (only 6 students in 2026), making it a popular choice among cross-province applicants, and regional preference provides some support for its ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3101, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction to 6 students (a reduction of about 14.3%), the significant increase of about 29.7% in the Beijing candidate pool, and the slightly negative reputation of the university: the enrollment reduction makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter), but the substantial increase in candidates and intensified competition make the ranking number larger (harder to enter), with the latter having a more significant impact. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 2915, with a range of 2623–3207.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Class) (2024 enrollment major)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class) (2021/2023 enrollment major)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Innovation Class) (2023 enrollment major)
- Business Administration (Economic Management Experimental Class) (2021 enrollment major)
- Mathematics (2021 enrollment major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology will only enroll 2 majors in Beijing's comprehensive category (Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class with 4 students, Computer Science and Technology Top Talent Program Class with 2 students), both top popular majors. For rankings within the predicted range of 2623–3207, it is recommended to choose Tier 2 majors as a safe option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3200), caution is advised. Due to the extremely small enrollment (only 6 students), ranking fluctuations are risky, so it is recommended to combine with other universities of the same level for a diversified application.
